etymology.description: semantic 木(木) (mù, "wood") + phonetic 午(午) (wǔ, "pestle") -> a wooden pestle
etymology.interpretation: Combines 木(木) (mù, "wood"), which signifies that the object is made of wood, with 午(午) (wǔ, "pestle") serving as the phonetic component to suggest the word's pronunciation. The character effectively depicts a pestle made from wood, as was traditionally used.

examples.chinese: 他用杵(他用杵)捣碎坚果(搗碎堅果)。
examples.english: He used a pestle to crush the nuts.

examples.chinese: 这根杵(這根杵)是用来捣蒜的(是用來搗蒜的)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè gēn chǔ shì yòng lái dǎo suàn de.
examples.english: This pestle is used for crushing garlic.

examples.chinese: 传统上(傳統上)，杵和臼一起使用(杵和臼一起使用)来制作药物(來製作藥物)。
examples.pinyin: Chuántǒng shàng, chǔ hé jiù yìqǐ shǐyòng lái zhìzuò yàowù.
examples.english: Traditionally, a pestle is used with a mortar to make medicine.
